[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000 a
1 0000000 a
2 0000000 a
3 0000000 a
4 1101001 4
5 1111101 6
6 1111101 6
7 0100100 2

01 10 1101001 4 match 4
12 21 1111101 6 match 5 6
23 32 0100100 2 match 7
34 43 0000000 a match 0 1 2 3
45 54 0000001 1
56 65 0010001 2
67 76 0010100 2
70 07 1001000 2

13 31 0100100 2 match 7
24 42 0000001 1
35 53 0100000 1
46 64 0000001 1
57 75 0011000 2
60 06 0000001 1
71 17 1011100 4

36 63 0000100 1
47 74 0000000 a match 0 1 2 3
50 05 0101001 3
61 16 0010101 3
72 27 1011100 4
